artifact: Anonymized benchmark tasks, raw scores, scoring code, dataset card, and confidence-interval panel.
inputs: 20 failure-inducing task templates, 4 learning strategies, 3 seeds, 5 rounds, anonymized model families.
outputs: 720 task trajectories and 3,600 round-level evaluation events.
repro_command: See the public artifact README and reproduction commands in the WisdomBench package.
limitations: Anonymized model-family reporting; language-agent benchmark only; not a claim of human-like wisdom.
expected_output: 720 task trajectories and 3,600 round-level evaluation events
runtime_requirements: public artifact README; no private credentials required

source: Proof-carrying action public protocol and redacted no-go briefing
artifact: NO-GO state, ActionWarrant pass/fail state, authority leak report, credit leak report, and closure blockers.
inputs: Action warrant schema, receipt closure checklist, no-credit repair queue, negative-space memory protocol.
outputs: A bounded proof that the system can refuse action when evidence is not closed.
repro_command: Run the public demo route or inspect the proof-carrying-action repository once released.
limitations: Redacted high-risk execution details; no live-money claim; no private customer data.
expected_output: No-go/blocked state when action evidence is not closed; no authority or credit leak claim boundary

inputs: Toy action packet with entry receipt, exit receipt, terminal receipt, wait-policy receipt, and counterfactual receipt.
outputs: Closed / blocked status plus missing evidence reasons.
limitations: Toy demo; validates interface logic, not production runtime.
expected_output: Closed or blocked action packet plus missing receipt reasons

source: Relational observability public site and systems evidence protocol
artifact: Public explanation, protocol cards, and planned research-track packet.
inputs: Relation field, actor constraints, evidence half-life, control-debt ledger, and actionability gate.
outputs: A systems-facing packet for diagnosing whether an AI workflow has enough observable structure to act or abstain.
repro_command: Inspect public registries, demos, and technology pages.
limitations: Protocol-stage public evidence; stronger claims require additional independent traces.
public_reproducibility: inspect public registry and technology pages
expected_output: Relation, control-debt, evidence half-life, and actionability boundary definitions

source: Counter-reflexive evidence integrity synthetic stress panel
artifact: Synthetic adverse-condition decision panel with gated action and recovery routes.
inputs: Occlusion, smoke, rain, glare, signal loss, stale map, target speed, and human-interference conditions.
outputs: Wrong-action rate, abstention rate, coverage, correct-action rate, and mission-weighted loss.
repro_command: See P20 rebuild artifact when public.
limitations: Synthetic; does not replace real robot validation.
public_reproducibility: claim boundary only until rebuilt public artifact is released
expected_output: Adverse-condition stress panel summary; not a real-robot validation

artifact: Detector/tracker degradation panel mapped to recovery, abstention, or additional evidence collection.
inputs: Public adverse-weather or adverse-visibility perception logs where available.
outputs: Evidence-integrity routing examples under degraded observations.
repro_command: See P20 public artifact when released.
limitations: Not detector SOTA; used to evaluate evidence routing and action gating.
public_reproducibility: inspect public boundary and counterexample route
expected_output: Evidence routing boundary for degraded observations

artifact: Redacted no-go state: NO_GO_PAPER_EXECUTION_BLOCKED, denominator 0, ActionWarrant pass 0, authority leak 0, credit leak 0.
inputs: Public briefing and redacted state summary.
outputs: A public boundary showing that the system refuses to act without closed proof.
repro_command: Inspect the public technical boundary route and proof-carrying-action demo; private execution logs are intentionally excluded.
limitations: No live trading edge, no customer readiness claim, and no private execution logs.
public_reproducibility: inspect public technical boundary route and proof-carrying demo
expected_output: No live-profit claim; proof-carrying action boundary only

artifact: ActionWarrant, ExecutionCert, ReceiptClosure, NoCreditRepair, NegativeSpaceMemory, and RegretAttribution object schema.
inputs: Public schema notes, demo packet, and bounded technical review route.
outputs: A reusable interface for separating recommendation, action authority, receipt closure, and clean learning.
limitations: Schema-level public evidence; production finance orchestration remains private.
public_reproducibility: inspect schema notes and runnable mini demo

artifact: Public task, raw score, scoring, dataset-card, and confidence-interval package.

limitations: Alias row; see canonical evidence E-P02-3600.

outputs: Closed or blocked gate state with missing evidence reasons.
limitations: Toy interface demo; not production deployment proof.

inputs: Repair intent, reports, bootstrap probes, semantic summaries, and denominator labels.

inputs: Research-only, no-go, shadow, suggestion, and demo outputs.

artifact: Editorial/review status transparency page and boundary notes.

artifact: Public technology page and registry route for relation/control-debt/evidence-half-life framing.

artifact: Machine-readable claims, evidence, actions, counterexamples, and claim-to-evidence mappings.

limitations: Registry consistency does not prove all empirical claims; it proves public evidence routing discipline.

artifact: Physical-AI evidence integrity claim boundary route.
